basics.name: Brandon Duy Nguyen
basics.label: Computer Science Student & IT Consultant
basics.summary: I am a Computer Science student at the University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa (B.S., expected December 2026) with hands-on experience in full-stack web development and IT support. I currently work as an IT Consultant at UH Mānoa's Information Technology Center, where I troubleshoot hardware, software, and network issues for students and faculty. I work with Python, Java, C, C++, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, and I enjoy building tools that solve real problems. I am actively seeking internship opportunities in software engineering and IT.

education.institution: University of Hawaii at Manoa, Honolulu, HI

work.company: University of Hawaii at Manoa — Information Technology Center
work.summary: Provide first-line technical support to students, faculty, and staff at UH Manoa's ITC building.
highlights: Provide first-line technical support across hardware, software, and network issues in a high-volume university IT environment.
Diagnose and resolve support tickets efficiently, maintaining service quality and user satisfaction standards.
Assist with device setup, account management, and system configurations across Windows and macOS platforms.
Communicate complex technical issues clearly to non-technical users.
